35363.zh_abstract: 匹配市场使用代理人可以操纵的绩效指标来分配稀缺机会。何时让指标更不易被操纵实际上会减少操纵行为？我们表明，答案取决于市场如何将评估转化为利害关系。当评估赋予价格——工资、信贷条件、按分数索引的支付——时，部分净化指标恰恰会在可操纵的变异主导它时增加操纵行为：市场对指标的信任上升速度快于其对操纵的暴露下降速度。相比之下，当评估赋予职位——按排名分配的固定席位——时，净化永远不会适得其反：排名抵消了激励中的信任，留下一个随指标离散度而缩减的排名价格，因此平均操纵行为单调下降。我们在一个一阶均衡概念下以闭式解求解了两种市场；转移支付为第一种机制提供了微观基础，排名锦标赛为第二种提供了微观基础。然后，一个奖金曲率指数决定了何时操纵会改善而非损害分类，以及何时完善指标本身在分类上是次优的。

35362.title: What Happens to Contractors After States Ban Affirmative Action?
35362.zh_title: 各州禁止平权行动后承包商发生了什么？
35362.abstract: Using restricted Census business records, I explore how banning affirmative action in state contracting affects minority- and women-owned business enterprises (MWBEs). I find that ending affirmative action led MWBE contractors to gradually downsize, with the most pronounced reductions in force experienced by Black-owned businesses and larger MWBEs. Despite these workforce changes, existing MWBEs were no more likely to shut down than other businesses. New MWBEs were relatively less common after a state's ban, highlighting how bans can shift the demographic composition of new contractors. A calibrated model suggests bans are equivalent to considerable reductions in MWBE productivity and scrap values.
35362.zh_abstract: 利用受限的人口普查商业记录，我探讨了在州政府合同中禁止平权行动如何影响少数族裔和女性拥有的企业（MWBEs）。我发现，结束平权行动导致MWBE承包商逐渐缩减规模，其中黑人拥有的企业和较大的MWBE经历的裁员最为显著。尽管存在这些劳动力变化，现有的MWBE比其它企业更不可能关闭。在州禁令之后，新的MWBE相对较少，这突显了禁令如何改变新承包商的人口构成。一个校准模型表明，禁令相当于MWBE生产力和残值的大幅降低。
35362.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H57, J15, J16, L25

35361.title: On the Origins of the Multinational Premium
35361.zh_title: 论跨国企业溢价的起源
35361.abstract: We study the relationship between management, multinational expansion, and risk premia. We document two facts: firms run by better managers are more likely to become multinationals (MNEs), and risk premia are higher for current and future MNEs than for firms that remain exclusively domestic. We develop a model in which endogenous matching between heterogeneous firms and managers jointly determines selection into foreign direct investment (FDI) and risk premia. Quantitatively, we use the model to examine how corporate taxation and distortions in the market for managerial talent affect multinational activity, firm risk exposure, and financial market outcomes.
35361.zh_abstract: 我们研究了管理、跨国扩张与风险溢价之间的关系。我们记录了两个事实：由更优秀管理者经营的公司更有可能成为跨国企业（MNEs），并且当前和未来的跨国企业的风险溢价高于那些始终只在国内经营的公司。我们开发了一个模型，其中异质性企业与管理者之间的内生匹配共同决定了对外直接投资（FDI）的选择和风险溢价。在量化分析中，我们利用该模型考察了公司税和管理人才市场的扭曲如何影响跨国活动、公司风险暴露以及金融市场结果。

35360.title: How Climate Shocks Produce Armed Rebellion: The 1970 Bhola Cyclone and the Birth of Bangladesh
35360.zh_title: 气候冲击如何引发武装叛乱：1970年博拉气旋与孟加拉国的诞生
35360.abstract: Why do climate shocks produce conflict (Hsiang et al., 2013)? We study the 1970 Bhola cyclone in East Pakistan, one of the deadliest natural disasters in recorded history, which killed an estimated 350,000 people. Using satellite imagery, archival records, electoral returns, and insurgent biographies, we show that cyclone exposure amplified pre-existing separatist sentiment at the ballot box and increased citizens’ subsequent participation in guerrilla warfare against the state. Our estimates imply that exposure to the cyclone’s devastation induced an additional 48,613 insurgents to join the guerrilla war effort. Effects are larger in areas with pre-existing political and economic grievances and weaker relief provision. Our analysis reveals the step-by-step mechanisms through which environmental shocks can produce conflict: they shift voting behavior, expose state indifference, and convert grievance into armed mobilization.
35360.zh_abstract: 为什么气候冲击会导致冲突（Hsiang et al., 2013）？我们研究了1970年发生在东巴基斯坦的博拉气旋，这是有记录以来最致命的自然灾害之一，估计造成35万人死亡。利用卫星图像、档案记录、选举结果和叛乱分子传记，我们表明，气旋暴露加剧了选票箱中已有的分离主义情绪，并增加了公民随后参与针对国家的游击战的可能性。我们的估计表明，暴露于气旋的破坏性导致额外48,613名叛乱分子加入了游击战。在存在先前政治和经济不满以及救济提供较弱的地区，影响更大。我们的分析揭示了环境冲击通过逐步机制产生冲突的过程：它们改变投票行为，暴露国家的冷漠，并将不满转化为武装动员。

35359.title: Transportation Infrastructure and Urban and Regional Development
35359.zh_title: 交通基础设施与城市及区域发展
35359.abstract: The literature assessing the effects of transportation infrastructure on how people and economic activity distribute themselves across a system of cities has three main parts. The theoretical literature makes robust predictions about how transportation infrastructure affects the internal structure of cities, but for systems of cities, theory does not let us rule much out. The city-level empirical literature establishes that improved urban transportation infrastructure causes suburban migration, but has only a small impact on city population. This literature is less helpful for understanding the effects of transportation infrastructure on the way people are distributed across a system of cities, but has made some progress. The small empirical literature looking at how transportation infrastructure affects systems of cities using cross-country data remains underdeveloped and is inconclusive.
35359.zh_abstract: 评估交通基础设施对人口和经济活动在城市体系内分布影响的文献主要包含三个部分。理论文献对交通基础设施如何影响城市内部结构做出了稳健的预测，但对于城市体系，理论无法排除太多可能性。城市层面的实证文献证实，改善城市交通基础设施会导致郊区迁移，但对城市人口的影响较小。这部分文献对于理解交通基础设施如何影响人口在城市体系中的分布帮助较小，但已取得一些进展。利用跨国数据考察交通基础设施如何影响城市体系的少量实证文献仍不成熟且尚无定论。

35358.title: The Short- and Long-Run Effects of Railroads on Mexico-US Migration
35358.zh_title: 铁路对墨西哥-美国移民的短期与长期效应
35358.abstract: This paper leverages variation in the access to the Mexican railroad network in the early 1900s to estimate its impact on migration to the United States and evaluate its long-run persistence after passenger rail service became obsolete. Using an IV strategy based on least-cost paths between historical cities, we find that locations with railroad access had migration rates four times higher than those without in the early twentieth century. Sequential migration was the key mechanism: railroads first facilitated internal mobility toward railroad hubs, then onward migration to the US. Railroad access also contributed to structural transformation, raising urbanization and local economic development. In terms of persistence, locations with historical railroad access show weakly lower total migration rates to the US in the early 21st century, consistent with local economic growth reducing the incentive to migrate. Yet destination-specific patterns prove remarkably durable: locations that disproportionately sent migrants to California, Arizona, or Texas in the 1900s continued to do so in the 2000s, reflecting the persistence of migrant networks.
35358.zh_abstract: 本文利用20世纪初墨西哥铁路网络通达性的变化，估计其对美国移民的影响，并在客运铁路服务过时后评估其长期持续性。基于历史城市间最低成本路径的IV策略，我们发现20世纪初拥有铁路通达性的地区移民率是未通达地区的四倍。序列迁移是关键机制：铁路首先促进向铁路枢纽的内部流动，继而推动向美国的后续迁移。铁路通达性还促进了结构转型，提高了城市化水平和地方经济发展。在持续性方面，拥有历史铁路通达性的地区在21世纪初对美国的总体移民率略低，这与地方经济增长降低了移民激励的结论一致。然而，目的地特定模式表现出显著的持久性：20世纪不成比例地向加利福尼亚、亚利桑那或得克萨斯输送移民的地区，在21世纪仍保持这一模式，反映了移民网络的持续性。

35357.title: Information Provision and Demand-Side Barriers to Healthcare Innovation: Experimental Evidence on Shared Medical Appointments in Menopause Care
35357.zh_title: 信息提供与医疗创新的需求侧障碍：更年期护理中共享医疗预约的实验证据
35357.authors: Soledad Giardili, Monika Heller, Sanjay Jain, Amalia R. Miller, Kamalini Ramdas
35357.abstract: Alternative care delivery models may offer benefits to patients and providers, but adoption often remains low. We study whether brief narrative testimonials shift willingness to attend virtual shared medical appointments (SMAs), a relatively little-used care format in which 5-15 patients with a shared non-urgent health condition meet simultaneously with a clinician. Using a pre-registered field experiment with over 4,000 women aged 45–60 in the UK, we randomly assigned participants to view only standard descriptive information about menopause appointment options (the control group) or to receive testimonials about SMAs from either previous patients or a clinician (treatment groups). Testimonials more than doubled the share of women choosing an SMA: when appointments were offered with a 6-8 week wait, 11% of the control group chose an SMA compared to 26% in the peer testimonials arm and 24% in the clinician testimonials arm. Shorter waiting times further increase uptake. When the SMA wait was reduced to one week, the share of women ever choosing an SMA rose by 14-19 percentage points across arms, reaching nearly 40% in the testimonial groups. Treatment effects are systematically larger among women with greater information-processing capacity: university education, higher baseline menopause knowledge, and broader information-seeking. Our findings suggest that women’s reluctance to choose SMAs is driven primarily by demand-side barriers, including unfamiliarity and uncertainty about their benefits, rather than deep-seated aversion to group-based care. Testimonials appear sufficient to meaningfully reduce these barriers.
35357.zh_abstract: 替代性护理交付模式可能为患者和提供者带来益处，但采纳率通常较低。我们研究简短叙事性证言是否能改变患者参加虚拟共享医疗预约（SMA）的意愿——这是一种较少使用的护理形式，其中5-15名患有共同非紧急健康状况的患者同时与临床医生会诊。通过对英国4000多名45-60岁女性进行预注册实地实验，我们随机分配参与者仅查看关于更年期预约选项的标准描述性信息（对照组），或接收来自既往患者或临床医生的SMA证言（处理组）。证言使选择SMA的女性比例翻倍以上：当预约等待时间为6-8周时，对照组11%选择SMA，而同伴证言组为26%，临床医生证言组为24%。更短的等待时间进一步提高了采纳率。当SMA等待时间缩短至一周时，各组中曾选择SMA的女性比例上升14-19个百分点，在证言组中接近40%。处理效应在信息处理能力更强的女性中系统性更大：大学教育、更高的基线更年期知识和更广泛的信息寻求行为。我们的发现表明，女性不愿选择SMA主要由需求侧障碍驱动，包括不熟悉和对其益处的不确定性，而非对群体护理的根深蒂固的厌恶。证言似乎足以显著减少这些障碍。
35357.meta: Programs：EH, PR；JEL：C93, D12, D83, D91, I11, I12

35356.title: Trading Frictions in Dynamic Cap-and-Trade Markets
35356.zh_title: 动态总量控制与交易市场中的交易摩擦
35356.authors: Nicola Borri, Yukun Liu, Aleh Tsyvinski, Xi Wu
35356.abstract: We develop a dynamic stochastic model of markets with an externality and multiple trading frictions, and cap-and-trade as the leading application. Slow participation, limited intermediation, and heterogeneous information interact in equilibrium: agents choose costly market access, access determines residual compliance demand, intermediary constraints translate residual demand into a surrender-month premium, and the premium feeds back into access incentives. These interactions shape how effectively the market corrects the externality. We characterize access choices in closed form, prove that the equilibrium premium is unique, and show that endogenous access dampens the response to each friction in isolation, while the interaction of multiple frictions is non-additive and can amplify the price response. We quantify the model using 2.7 million EU ETS registry transactions and compliance records from 2005–2021. About 40% of operators do not trade annually, purchases concentrate in April when returns are systematically high, and operator flow predicts future returns.
35356.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有外部性和多种交易摩擦的市场动态随机模型，以总量控制与交易为主要应用。缓慢参与、有限中介和异质信息在均衡中相互作用：代理人选择成本高昂的市场准入，准入决定剩余合规需求，中介约束将剩余需求转化为交割月溢价，而溢价反馈影响准入激励。这些相互作用塑造了市场纠正外部性的有效性。我们以闭式解刻画准入选择，证明均衡溢价的唯一性，并表明内生准入会削弱单一摩擦的响应，而多种摩擦的相互作用是非加性的，可能放大价格响应。我们利用2005-2021年欧盟排放交易体系（EU ETS）270万笔注册交易和合规记录对模型进行量化。约40%的运营商不每年交易，购买集中在4月（此时回报系统性偏高），运营商流量可预测未来回报。

35355.title: Panel Attrition, Data Imputation and Age Patterns in Subjective Ill-being
35355.zh_title: 面板流失、数据插补与主观不良福祉的年龄模式
35355.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Alan J. Cui
35355.abstract: We examine the implications of panel attrition for the age profile of subjective ill-being in the Global Flourishing Study (GFS). We establish that survey attrition rates are high, and are highest among the young, particularly when interviewed in wave 1 using a computer-assisted web interview (CAWI). We then deploy three methods (inverse probability weighting, multiple imputation chain equations, and last observation carried forward) to estimate the age pattern in subjective ill-being in wave 2 of the survey. All three methods have their strengths and weaknesses, but we demonstrate that such adjustments are merited given the nature of survey attrition in the data. We conclude that subjective ill-being is declining in age in both waves 1 and 2 of the GFS having accounted for sample attrition, something that would not have been apparent if one simply ran wave 2 regressions without accounting for sample attrition.
35355.zh_abstract: 我们考察面板流失对全球繁荣研究（GFS）中主观不良福祉年龄轮廓的影响。我们发现调查流失率较高，且在年轻人中最高，尤其是在第一轮使用计算机辅助网络访谈（CAWI）时。随后，我们采用三种方法（逆概率加权、多重插补链方程和末次观测值结转）估计调查第二轮中主观不良福祉的年龄模式。这三种方法各有优劣，但我们证明鉴于数据中调查流失的性质，此类调整是必要的。我们得出结论：在考虑样本流失后，GFS第一轮和第二轮中主观不良福祉随年龄下降，而若仅运行第二轮回归而不考虑样本流失，这一模式将不明显。

35354.title: The Perceived Inflation Wedge
35354.abstract: Standard measures of inflation, such as the Consumer Price Index (CPI), are designed to measure changes in the cost of living, not how households perceive price changes under limited attention and imperfect information. This paper introduces Perceived Inflation (PI), an attention-weighted inflation measure derived from a model in which households allocate attention across goods and observe noisy price signals. I construct monthly PI using disaggregated CPI data and attention proxies based on price salience, volatility, media mentions, and search behavior. The resulting PI series is highly correlated with CPI inflation but exhibits greater short-run volatility, especially during the Global Financial Crisis, the COVID-19 recession, and the 2021–22 inflation surge. A state-space version of the index implies a persistent latent attention component and a time-varying PI wedge. Finally, the paper embeds the estimated PI wedge into a heterogeneous-household model to demonstrate how attention-driven distortions in inflation perceptions affect saving and consumption through perceived real returns.
35354.zh_abstract: 标准通胀指标（如消费者价格指数CPI）旨在衡量生活成本变化，而非在有限注意力和不完全信息下家庭如何感知价格变化。本文引入感知通胀（PI），一种基于模型的注意力加权通胀指标，其中家庭在商品间分配注意力并观察含噪价格信号。我利用细分CPI数据和基于价格显著性、波动性、媒体报道和搜索行为的注意力代理变量，构建月度PI。所得PI序列与CPI通胀高度相关，但短期波动性更大，尤其是在全球金融危机、COVID-19衰退和2021-22年通胀飙升期间。该指数的状态空间版本暗示存在持久的潜在注意力成分和时变PI楔子。最后，本文将估计的PI楔子嵌入异质性家庭模型，以展示注意力驱动的通胀感知扭曲如何通过感知实际回报影响储蓄和消费。
35354.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C32, D84, E21, E31, E71

35353.title: Task-Specific Technical Change and Comparative Advantage
35353.zh_title: 任务特定技术变革与比较优势
35353.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) reshapes workers’ comparative advantage by altering the tasks they perform and the skills those tasks require. We develop a dynamic task-based model to quantify the general-equilibrium effects of task-specific technical change. Workers have multidimensional skills, choose occupations, and accumulate skills on the job; occupations combine tasks, and productivity depends on how workers’ skills match task requirements. We develop a computationally efficient procedure to estimate the model using panel data and a new database of task-level skill requirements. We apply the model to AI, allowing it to augment, automate, and simplify tasks. We find that AI narrows wage inequality and raises average wages across scenarios ranging from slow to rapid AI progress. The key equalizing force is simplification: by lowering tasks’ skill requirements, AI lets lower-skill workers compete for previously inaccessible jobs. Adoption costs, highest for lower-skill workers, dampen but do not eliminate the decline in inequality.
35353.zh_abstract: 人工智能通过改变工人执行的任务及这些任务所需的技能，重塑工人的比较优势。我们开发了一个动态任务基础模型，以量化任务特定技术变革的一般均衡效应。工人具有多维技能，选择职业并在工作中积累技能；职业组合任务，生产率取决于工人技能与任务要求的匹配程度。我们开发了一种计算高效的流程，利用面板数据和新的任务级技能要求数据库来估计模型。我们将模型应用于人工智能，允许其增强、自动化和简化任务。我们发现，在从缓慢到快速的人工智能进步情景中，人工智能缩小了工资不平等并提高了平均工资。关键的均等化力量是简化：通过降低任务的技能要求，人工智能让低技能工人能够竞争此前无法进入的工作。采纳成本（对低技能工人最高）抑制但并未消除不平等的下降。
35353.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：C6, C8, D2, D58, E20, J20, J3, J6, O3, O4

35352.title: Insurance with Multiple Actors
35352.zh_title: 多方参与保险中的成本分担设计
35352.authors: Jason Abaluck, Oren Sarig, Jintaek Song
35352.abstract: We analyze how social-planner insurers split cost-sharing between consumers and firms (e.g. patients and doctors, or drivers and car mechanics). With no contracting frictions, firm cost-sharing can replace consumer cost-sharing other than “visit copays.” Optimal firm contracts depend on the marginal rate of substitution between consumer and firm cost-sharing. For Medicare physician services, paying physicians more up front but less as spending increases reduces risk for both patients and providers; in our calibration, net benefits are twice those from eliminating Medigap externality. For prescription drugs, a dollar of physician paperwork costs is 45–110 times more impactful than a dollar of consumer cost-sharing.
35352.zh_abstract: 本文分析社会规划型保险公司如何在消费者与企业（如患者与医生、司机与汽车修理工）之间分配成本分担。在无契约摩擦的情况下，除“就诊共付额”外，企业成本分担可替代消费者成本分担。最优企业契约取决于消费者与企业成本分担之间的边际替代率。对于医疗保险医师服务，前期向医生支付更多费用但随支出增加而减少支付，可同时降低患者和提供者的风险；在我们的校准中，净收益是消除补充医疗保险外部性收益的两倍。对于处方药，一美元的医生文书成本对福利的影响是消费者成本分担一美元的45至110倍。

35351.title: An Informational Rationale for Viewpoint Neutrality in Education
35351.zh_title: 教育中观点中立性的信息学理由
35351.abstract: Consider a society that faces uncertainty about a payoff-relevant state and wants to train students to make correct decisions. In educational institutions, students learn from their teachers, but they also get outside information, and later learn from peers. We show that privately Bayesian actions need not be optimal inputs into social learning: when students' actions reflect teacher-side information that is correlated across peers, observing many such actions can give this information excessive social weight. A social planner may therefore optimally reduce the precision of instruction, inducing students to rely more on outside information before their actions become signals for others, and students can end up better informed despite learning less from their teachers. The case for a precision cap is stronger when peer interaction is homophilous, because same-teacher information is more likely to survive aggregation, and weaker when outside information is itself systematically distorted. This provides an informational rationale for viewpoint neutrality as an institutional policy: it limits the social overrepresentation of correlated teacher-side information when students mostly learn from peers exposed to similar sources.
35351.zh_abstract: 考虑一个面临与收益相关状态不确定性的社会，希望训练学生做出正确决策。在教育机构中，学生从教师那里学习，但也获取外部信息，并随后向同伴学习。我们证明，私人贝叶斯行动不一定是社会学习的最优输入：当学生的行动反映了同伴间相关的教师方信息时，观察大量此类行动可能赋予该信息过高的社会权重。因此，社会规划者可能最优地降低教学精度，诱导学生在行动成为他人信号之前更多地依赖外部信息，最终学生虽从教师处学得更少，却能获得更充分的信息。当同伴互动具有同质性时，实施精度上限的理由更强，因为相同教师的信息更可能在聚合中幸存；而当外部信息本身存在系统性扭曲时，该理由则较弱。这为将观点中立性作为一项制度政策提供了信息学理由：当学生主要从接触相似来源的同伴那里学习时，该政策限制了相关教师方信息在社会中的过度代表。

35350.title: How Serious Are Experimenter Demand Effects? Evidence and Mitigation Strategies
35350.zh_title: 实验者需求效应有多严重？证据与缓解策略
35350.authors: Jonathan de Quidt, Lise Vesterlund, Alistair Wilson
35350.abstract: Experimenter demand effects arise when participants in an experiment or survey distort their behavior in a misguided attempt to please the experimenter by confirming their research hypothesis. Experimental economists have taken the threat of demand effects seriously and have developed an array of best practices to mitigate their influence, as well as bounding techniques to assess their potential impact on inference. We provide an overview of these techniques and summarize recent empirical assessments of the potential threat of experimenter demand. Our main message is that good design is normally sufficient to address demand concerns, and that bounding approaches work well when concerns remain. Existing empirical evidence suggests that the potential impact of experimenter demand is limited.
35350.zh_abstract: 当实验或调查中的参与者出于误导性动机，试图通过证实研究假设来取悦实验者，从而扭曲其行为时，便产生了实验者需求效应。实验经济学家认真对待需求效应的威胁，并开发了一系列最佳实践来减轻其影响，以及评估其对推断潜在影响的边界技术。我们概述了这些技术，并总结了近期对实验者需求潜在威胁的实证评估。我们的主要信息是，良好的设计通常足以解决需求问题，而当担忧依然存在时，边界方法效果良好。现有实证证据表明，实验者需求的潜在影响是有限的。

35349.title: Planning Capital and Discovery-Based Learning-by-Doing: Investment as Staged Discovery in the Hyperscale Era
35349.zh_title: 规划资本与基于发现的干中学：超大规模时代的投资作为分阶段发现
35349.abstract:
This paper treats frontier investment as staged discovery. Firms invest through sequences of costly inquiry stages before deciding whether and how to realize value. At each stage, a firm may sharpen its diagnostic understanding, choose what question to ask, embody that question in a costly action, and interpret the answer that action produces. The answer changes what the firm knows, what it can do next, and how costly future inquiry will be. Successful histories can also carry over to later related problems, making the firm a better learner beyond the current investment path.
The paper calls the resulting asset planning capital in firm form. Planning capital is the accumulated diagnostic understanding a firm has built through costly inquiry and operation: understanding of technologies, processes, customers, tools, partners, failures, constraints, and opportunities, together with the capacity to keep learning. It becomes valuable because it helps the firm choose what to investigate, make the question answerable, interpret what happened, and carry what it learned into later investment stages. Building on classical investment theory, R&D models, real-options theory, venture-capital models, classical learning-by-doing, the paper develops a model of investment as staged discovery. 
The AI and semiconductor frontier makes this asset visible. Firms are being valued and funded for more than the physical capacity they already own. Chips, fabs, data centers, cloud platforms, power commitments, and model systems matter because they carry traces of accumulated learning and because their use generates more learning. They let firms train models, test demand, expose bottlenecks, improve yields, qualify customers, integrate tools, and discover which complements are missing. The current buildout is therefore investment in capacity and in the institutional learning system that makes capacity more valuable over time.
The framework explains why production systems, tool systems, research paths, sovereign capability programs, and infrastructure sponsorship belong in the same analysis. They are different institutional forms through which planning capital is accumulated. The paper treats terminal realization value in reduced form and focuses on the discovery process that precedes it: how institutions build capacity, learn from using it, and turn accumulated diagnostic understanding into an advantage in the next round of investment.
35349.zh_abstract: 本文将前沿投资视为分阶段发现。企业在决定是否以及如何实现价值之前，通过一系列代价高昂的探究阶段进行投资。在每个阶段，企业可能深化其诊断性理解，选择要提出的问题，将该问题体现在代价高昂的行动中，并解读该行动产生的答案。答案改变了企业所知、下一步能做什么以及未来探究的成本。成功的历史还可以延续到后续相关问题，使企业在当前投资路径之外成为更好的学习者。 本文将由此产生的资产称为企业形式的规划资本。规划资本是企业通过代价高昂的探究和运营积累的诊断性理解：对技术、流程、客户、工具、合作伙伴、失败、约束和机会的理解，以及持续学习的能力。它之所以有价值，是因为它帮助企业选择要调查的内容、使问题可回答、解读发生的情况，并将所学带入后续投资阶段。基于经典投资理论、研发模型、实物期权理论、风险投资模型和经典干中学，本文构建了投资作为分阶段发现的模型。 人工智能和半导体前沿使这一资产变得可见。企业的估值和融资已超越其已拥有的物理产能。芯片、晶圆厂、数据中心、云平台、电力承诺和模型系统之所以重要，是因为它们承载了累积学习的痕迹，且其使用能产生更多学习。它们让企业训练模型、测试需求、暴露瓶颈、改进良率、认证客户、集成工具，并发现哪些互补品缺失。因此，当前的扩建既是对产能的投资，也是对使产能随时间更具价值的制度性学习系统的投资。 该框架解释了为何生产系统、工具系统、研究路径、主权能力项目和基础设施赞助应纳入同一分析。它们是规划资本积累的不同制度形式。本文以简化形式处理终端实现价值，并聚焦于其前的发现过程：机构如何建设产能、通过使用产能学习，并将累积的诊断性理解转化为下一轮投资中的优势。
35349.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：D83, G24, L22, L63, O31, O32

35348.title: The Informed Insider: A Leading Measure of Quality
35348.zh_title: 知情内部人：质量的前瞻性度量
35348.authors: Wei Cai, Dennis Campbell, Yaxuan Chen, Yufei Chen, Andrea Prat
35348.abstract: Product and service quality is fundamental to firm value creation, yet it is well recognized as difficult to observe ex ante. Existing quality proxies are limited in coverage, lack cross-firm comparability, and primarily rely on lagging indicators that capture product or service failures only after they materialize. Exploiting employees’ informational advantage as informed insiders and firsthand observers of firms’ internal operations, we develop and validate a novel, forward-looking measure of firm-year-level product and service quality using over 4.3 million employee reviews on Glassdoor. Leveraging machine learning models trained on a subset of firms with third-party customer satisfaction data, we construct quality indices for S&P 1500 firms spanning 2008 to 2023. The resulting quality measures exhibit meaningful variation across firms and within firms over time. In out-of-sample tests, our quality indices demonstrate strong predictive power for future quality provision, emerging as the single most important predictor relative to firm fundamentals and Glassdoor ratings. We validate our measure by examining its association with alternative quality metrics. We show that our quality measures are useful in predicting important quality-related firm outcomes such as product recalls, brand value, and profitability. We also construct an alternative set of quality measures using a zero-shot prompt-based approach and a supervised fine-tuning approach with GPT models to assess the potential of LLMs and generative AI in capturing firm-level quality provision. Our paper shows the value of employee voices as a powerful, forward-looking, and scalable signal of firm quality provision. The paper offers implications for stakeholders seeking to identify quality-related risks and opportunities before they become externally visible.
35348.zh_abstract: 产品和服务质量是企业价值创造的基础，但公认难以事前观察。现有质量代理变量覆盖范围有限、缺乏跨企业可比性，且主要依赖滞后指标，仅在产品或服务失败显现后才捕捉到问题。利用员工作为知情内部人和企业运营一手观察者的信息优势，我们开发并验证了一种新颖的、前瞻性的企业-年度层面产品和服务质量度量，使用了Glassdoor上超过430万条员工评论。利用在拥有第三方客户满意度数据的企业子集上训练的机器学习模型，我们构建了2008年至2023年标普1500企业的质量指数。所得质量度量在企业间和企业内随时间均表现出有意义的变异。在样本外测试中，我们的质量指数对未来质量提供表现出强大的预测能力，相对于企业基本面和Glassdoor评分，成为最重要的单一预测因子。我们通过检验其与替代质量指标的相关性来验证我们的度量。我们证明，质量度量在预测产品召回、品牌价值和盈利能力等重要质量相关企业结果方面具有实用性。我们还使用基于零样本提示的方法和基于GPT模型的监督微调方法构建了另一套质量度量，以评估大语言模型和生成式人工智能在捕捉企业层面质量提供方面的潜力。本文展示了员工声音作为企业质量提供的强大、前瞻性和可扩展信号的价值。本文为寻求在质量相关风险和机会外部可见之前识别它们的利益相关者提供了启示。

35347.title: AI Diffusion Gaps: Unequal Integration of AI Across K-12 Schools
35347.zh_title: 人工智能扩散鸿沟：K-12学校中人工智能的不平等整合
35347.abstract: Although use of generative AI tools has quickly become widespread in education settings, emerging evidence suggests that effects on learning will depend on how that use is supported and guided. This paper reports findings from an original national survey of K-12 school principals designed to measure institutional integration of AI in schools through policies, teacher training, guidance for student use, leadership engagement, and the availability of AI-enabled tools. We find that AI use has spread rapidly across schools, largely as a productivity aid. Students mainly use AI for homework help and writing, while educators primarily use it for lesson planning and administrative tasks. The development of teacher training, guidance, and school policies has lagged adoption. We next document two diffusion gaps across schools: First, lower AI integration is associated with a higher share of disadvantaged students (a one standard deviation increase in disadvantage is associated with a 0.07-0.11 SD lower score on an index of AI integration); Second, private and charter schools score 0.23-0.44 SD lower on the AI integration index than traditional public schools. Although several surveyed school-level factors strongly predict AI integration, they do little to explain these gaps. Differences in district size account for roughly one-third of the disadvantage gap between public schools. These findings suggest that the factors associated with greater AI integration differ from those needed to narrow disparities in how schools support and guide AI use.
35347.zh_abstract: 尽管生成式人工智能工具在教育环境中的使用已迅速普及，但新出现的证据表明，对学习的影响将取决于这种使用如何得到支持和引导。本文报告了一项针对K-12学校校长的原创全国性调查结果，该调查旨在通过政策、教师培训、学生使用指导、领导层参与以及人工智能工具的可获得性，衡量学校中人工智能的制度性整合程度。我们发现，人工智能的使用已在学校中迅速传播，主要作为生产力辅助工具。学生主要将人工智能用于作业帮助和写作，而教育工作者主要将其用于课程规划和行政任务。教师培训、指导和学校政策的发展滞后于采用。我们随后记录了学校间的两个扩散鸿沟：第一，较低的人工智能整合与较高的弱势学生比例相关（弱势程度每增加一个标准差，人工智能整合指数得分降低0.07-0.11个标准差）；第二，私立学校和特许学校在人工智能整合指数上的得分比传统公立学校低0.23-0.44个标准差。尽管调查中几个学校层面的因素强烈预测人工智能整合，但它们对解释这些鸿沟作用甚微。学区规模的差异解释了公立学校之间约三分之一的弱势差距。这些发现表明，与更大程度人工智能整合相关的因素，与缩小学校在支持和引导人工智能使用方面差异所需因素不同。

35346.title: Elderly Health and Longevity in the US: Evidence and Implications
35346.zh_title: 美国老年人健康与长寿：证据与启示
35346.abstract: Rising elderly life expectancy is a well-known source of fiscal pressure on Social Security and Medicare – but how have declining mortality and morbidity affected the two programs’ relative finances? Using nearly three decades of Medicare Current Beneficiary Survey data (1992-2019), we estimate that these demographic changes raised expected lifetime Social Security spending by over twice as much as expected lifetime Medicare spending: 14% compared to 6%. The slower growth of elderly lifetime health care spending than annuity spending reflects two features of how longevity has increased: the additional 2.4 years of remaining life expectancy were entirely healthy – free of physical or cognitive limitations – while the expected amount of time spent with severe health limitations fell by about 30%, reducing expected lifetime nursing-home and home-health use. We then write down a stylized life-cycle model of a risk-averse retiree facing stochastic mortality and health to illuminate the key forces that affect the optimal allocation of a fixed amount of public funds across Medicare and Social Security.
35346.zh_abstract: 老年人预期寿命延长是社会保障和医疗保险财政压力的已知来源——但死亡率和发病率的下降如何影响这两个项目的相对财务状况？利用近三十年的医疗保险受益人调查数据（1992-2019年），我们估计这些人口结构变化使预期终身社会保障支出增加了14%，而预期终身医疗保险支出仅增加6%，前者是后者的两倍以上。老年人终身医疗支出增长慢于年金支出增长，反映了长寿增加的两种特征：剩余预期寿命增加的2.4年完全健康——无身体或认知限制——而严重健康限制的预期时间减少了约30%，从而降低了预期终身护理院和家庭健康服务的使用。随后，我们构建了一个简化的生命周期模型，其中风险规避的退休者面临随机死亡率和健康状况，以阐明影响公共资金在医疗保险和社会保障之间最优分配的关键因素。
35346.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：H51, H55, I1, J14

35345.title: Beta for Alpha: Neural Engagement in Financial Trading
35345.zh_title: 阿尔法贝塔：金融交易中的神经参与
35345.authors: Liang Chen, Tse-Chun Lin, Fei Wu, Xingjian Zheng, Eric Zou
35345.abstract: The emergence of wearable electroencephalography (EEG) technologies presents new opportunities to identify and quantify neural correlates of decision-making in real-time, financially consequential settings. We report a field study in which we use wearable EEG devices to record brainwave activity from professional day traders during real-world, high-stakes trading. Using these signals, we construct an established psychophysiological Engagement Index (EI), which is defined as beta wave power divided by the sum of alpha and theta wave power, and document clear spike-and-decay patterns around trade execution. Linking EI dynamics to trading performance, we find that more successful trades are preceded by larger EI spikes in the 30 seconds before execution, while baseline or background EI levels have no predictive power and, if anything, are negatively associated with performance. We further show that higher EI is associated with attenuated behavioral biases in trading, including the round number heuristic and the disposition effect.
35345.zh_abstract: 可穿戴脑电图技术的出现为识别和量化实时、高财务影响环境中的决策神经关联提供了新机遇。我们报告了一项实地研究，使用可穿戴脑电图设备记录专业日内交易者在真实高风险交易中的脑电波活动。利用这些信号，我们构建了已确立的心理生理学参与指数，定义为贝塔波功率除以阿尔法波与西塔波功率之和，并记录了交易执行前后清晰的尖峰-衰减模式。将参与指数动态与交易绩效关联，我们发现更成功的交易在执行前30秒内伴随更大的参与指数尖峰，而基线或背景参与指数水平无预测能力，甚至与绩效负相关。我们进一步证明，较高的参与指数与交易中行为偏差的减弱相关，包括整数启发式和处置效应。
35345.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：C80, C89, D91, G11, G41, J24

35394.title: Safer Driving for a Price: Evidence on Behavior and Habits in Kenyan Minibuses
35394.zh_title: 付费安全驾驶：肯尼亚小巴司机的行为与习惯证据
35394.authors: David Schönholzer, Gregory Lane, Erin M. Kelley
35394.abstract: Road traffic injuries are the leading cause of death among people aged 5–29. Where traffic laws are weakly enforced, it is unclear whether road safety interventions can change behavior. We run a randomized controlled trial among 203 Kenyan minibuses, testing whether an incentive scheme improves safety overall or merely shifts unsafe driving to unmonitored times. Drivers reduce speeding by 29 percent and harsh braking by 13 percent, improving a safety index by 0.096 standard deviations. Labor-supply and earnings effects are modest, with little displacement across times or places. Improvements fade quickly, suggesting lasting change requires sustained enforcement or stronger incentives.
35394.zh_abstract: 道路交通伤害是5-29岁人群的首要死因。在交通法规执行薄弱的环境中，道路安全干预措施能否改变行为尚不明确。我们对203辆肯尼亚小巴开展随机对照试验，检验激励计划是全面改善安全，还是仅将危险驾驶转移至无监控时段。结果显示，司机超速行为减少29%，急刹车减少13%，安全指数提升0.096个标准差。劳动力供给与收入效应温和，且未发现显著的时间或空间替代效应。但改善效果迅速消退，表明持久改变需要持续执法或更强激励。

35393.title: Wealth Inequality and Safe Asset Demand
35393.zh_title: 财富不平等与安全资产需求
35393.abstract: We study how wealth inequality shapes safe-asset demand in heterogeneous-agent economies. Asset bubbles arise when agents face sufficiently high probabilities of falling into extreme poverty. In such cases, assets insulated from idiosyncratic risk become infinitely large relative to agents' wealth ex-post, which makes them infinitely valuable ex-ante. This mechanism is fundamentally different from classic rational bubbles, generates bubbles even under stationary wealth distributions, and requires no aggregate uncertainty or growth. Using this insight, we revisit the pricing of aggregate assets in standard heterogeneous-agent economies, and show that prior analyses may be incomplete due to overlooked possibility of transversality condition violation.
35393.zh_abstract: 我们研究异质性主体经济中财富不平等如何塑造安全资产需求。当主体面临足够高的极端贫困风险时，资产泡沫便会出现。在此情形下，免受异质性风险冲击的资产事后相对于主体财富变得无限大，从而使其事前价值趋于无穷。这一机制与经典理性泡沫存在本质差异，即便在稳态财富分布下也能产生泡沫，且无需总体不确定性或经济增长。基于此洞见，我们重新审视标准异质性主体经济中总体资产的定价问题，并表明先前分析可能因忽视横截条件违反的可能性而存在不完整性。

35392.title: Immigration, Innovation, and the Geography of Growth
35392.zh_title: 移民、创新与增长的地理格局
35392.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Sun Kyoung Lee, Michael Peters
35392.abstract: Between 1880 and 1920, more than 20 million immigrants settled in the United States. We study how this migration wave affected innovation and growth. Using a newly constructed dataset linking individual census records to historical immigration records and the universe of US patents, we highlight a new channel through which immigrants contributed to growth: they disproportionately settled in urban innovation hubs. To quantify the aggregate and regional effects of this mass migration episode, we develop a new spatial growth model in which skilled workers have a comparative advantage in innovation and sort endogenously across space. We find that international arrivals after 1880 raised US income per capita by 8.2% by 1940. Removing the subsequent immigration restrictions of the 1920s would have raised income per capita by a further 1.7% by 2000. Immigrants' skill composition and their concentration in urban hubs are key drivers of these effects.
35392.zh_abstract: 1880年至1920年间，超过2000万移民定居美国。我们研究此次移民浪潮对创新与增长的影响。通过构建将个人普查记录、历史移民记录与美国全部专利数据相链接的新数据集，我们揭示了移民促进增长的新渠道：他们不成比例地聚集于城市创新中心。为量化此次大规模移民事件的总体与区域效应，我们构建了新的空间增长模型，其中技能工人在创新方面具有比较优势，并在空间上内生分类。研究发现，1880年后的国际移民使1940年美国人均收入提高8.2%。若取消1920年代的后续移民限制，2000年人均收入将进一步增长1.7%。移民的技能构成及其在城市中心的集聚是这些效应的关键驱动因素。
35392.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：N91, O11, O30, R13

35391.title: Government Funding Costs Under Financial Repression
35391.zh_title: 金融抑制下的政府融资成本
35391.authors: Roberto Gómez-Cram, Howard Kung, Hanno Lustig, David Zeke
35391.abstract: We study the equilibrium effects of financial repression on government funding costs in an endowment economy with limited asset market participation. We show how a broad set of repression policies operates through a wedge in the Euler equation responsive to government size or by affecting fiscal redistribution between agents. Repression intensity is captured by a policy feedback rule that depends positively on net government spending. When fiscal policy is profligate and monetary policy accommodates, we show that such a repression policy raises bond values, reduces the inflationary cost of unfunded fiscal expansions, and lowers bond risk premia. Repression is not a free lunch for bondholders---they pay a lower inflation tax but also earn lower future real returns. When monetary policy does not accommodate fiscal policy, repression can provide stopgap funding for deficits, allowing the central bank to retain control over inflation while making government debt a hedge for fiscal inflation.
35391.zh_abstract: 我们在有限资产市场参与的禀赋经济中研究金融抑制对政府融资成本的均衡效应。我们展示了广泛的抑制政策如何通过响应政府规模的欧拉方程楔子，或通过影响主体间的财政再分配来发挥作用。抑制强度由正向依赖于净政府支出的政策反馈规则刻画。当财政政策挥霍且货币政策宽松时，此类抑制政策会提升债券价值，降低无资金支持的财政扩张的通胀成本，并压低债券风险溢价。抑制对债券持有人并非免费午餐——他们支付较低的通胀税，但未来实际回报也较低。当货币政策不配合财政政策时，抑制可为赤字提供临时融资，使央行在保持通胀控制的同时，让政府债务成为财政通胀的对冲工具。

35390.title: Pricing and Production Without the Invisible Hand
35390.zh_title: 没有看不见的手的定价与生产
35390.authors: Joel P. Flynn, George Nikolakoudis, Karthik Sastry
35390.abstract: Modern theories of the business cycle do not allow for the simultaneous rational choice of both prices and quantities, instead assuming that an “invisible hand” determines one of these variables to clear markets. In this paper, we develop a macroeconomic model in which both prices and quantities are chosen optimally by firms and exchange is both voluntary and efficient. As a consequence, individual markets will generically be in Walrasian disequilibrium: either slack (over-supplied) or rationed (under-supplied). The absence of market clearing changes pricing and production in qualitatively important ways: markups are governed by the probability of rationing rather than the elasticity of demand, and higher uncertainty reduces production and increases markups. Marrying the Old and New Keynesian traditions, we study general Walrasian disequilibrium with rational expectations and optimal firm decisions. On a technical level, we characterize cross-market spillovers arising from rationed demand with differentiated goods, overcoming the standard combinatorial problem that arises when studying multi-market disequilibrium. Unlike in New Keynesian economies, monetary shocks propagate by reducing product-market slack, raising aggregate labor productivity and consumption with muted effects on employment, while uncertainty shocks act as stagflationary cost-push shocks.
35390.zh_abstract: 现代商业周期理论不允许价格与数量的同时理性选择，而是假设“看不见的手”决定其中一个变量以出清市场。本文构建了企业同时最优选择价格与数量、且交换既自愿又有效的宏观经济模型。因此，单个市场通常处于瓦尔拉斯非均衡状态：要么松弛（供给过剩），要么配给（供给不足）。市场出清的缺失以重要的定性方式改变了定价与生产：加成率由配给概率而非需求弹性决定，更高的不确定性会降低产量并提高加成率。融合旧凯恩斯主义与新凯恩斯主义传统，我们研究具有理性预期与企业最优决策的一般瓦尔拉斯非均衡。在技术层面，我们刻画了差异化商品配给需求产生的跨市场溢出效应，克服了研究多市场非均衡时面临的标准组合问题。与新凯恩斯经济不同，货币冲击通过减少产品市场松弛来传导，提高总体劳动生产率和消费，但对就业影响温和；而不确定性冲击则充当滞胀型成本推动冲击。

35389.title: International Risk-Sharing in a Fragmented World
35389.zh_title: 碎片化世界中的国际风险分担
35389.authors: Javier Bianchi, Sebastian Horn, Giovanni Rosso, César Sosa-Padilla
35389.abstract: This paper studies how geopolitical risk shapes financial fragmentation and international risk-sharing, using bilateral official lending data from 1910 to 2024. We document that when geopolitical risk is high, bilateral lending increasingly follows geopolitical alignment. Because geopolitically aligned countries experience more synchronized shocks, this fragmentation limits the effectiveness of international risk-sharing. To rationalize these patterns, we introduce geopolitical considerations into a limited-commitment model of sovereign borrowing. The model shows that, even with non-discriminatory default, higher geopolitical tensions redirect international lending toward allied countries and weaken risk-sharing.
35389.zh_abstract: 本文利用1910年至2024年的双边官方贷款数据，研究地缘政治风险如何塑造金融碎片化与国际风险分担。我们记录到，当地缘政治风险高企时，双边贷款日益遵循地缘政治联盟。由于地缘政治联盟国家面临更同步的冲击，这种碎片化限制了国际风险分担的有效性。为解释这些模式，我们将地缘政治因素引入有限承诺的主权借贷模型。模型表明，即使存在非歧视性违约，更高的地缘政治紧张局势也会将国际贷款引向盟国，并削弱风险分担。

35388.title: Fragmentation of Shareholder Power
35388.authors: Andrey Malenko, Nadya Malenko, Anton Tsoy
35388.abstract: The asset management industry is increasingly shifting toward tailored portfolios, fund proliferation, and decentralization of stewardship—trends partly driven by growing heterogeneity in investor preferences. While these developments better align investment products with investor demands, they also reshape ownership structures, potentially leading to more fragmented ownership and weaker managerial oversight. We develop a framework to evaluate these trade-offs and show that fund proliferation does not necessarily weaken governance: Stronger incentives for asset managers and concentrated portfolios of specialized funds can offset these effects, especially when investor preferences are intense. However, strong investor preferences can also induce asset managers to compete on a new margin—granting investors control by decentralizing stewardship and adopting pass-through voting—without internalizing the associated governance costs.
35388.zh_abstract: 资产管理行业正日益转向定制化投资组合、基金数量激增以及管理权分散化——这些趋势部分源于投资者偏好的异质性增强。虽然这些发展使投资产品更好地契合投资者需求，但也重塑了所有权结构，可能导致所有权更加分散和管理层监督弱化。我们构建了一个评估这些权衡的框架，并表明基金数量激增并不必然削弱治理：更强的资产管理人激励和专业化基金的集中投资组合可以抵消这些影响，尤其是在投资者偏好强烈的情况下。然而，强烈的投资者偏好也可能促使资产管理人在一个新的维度上展开竞争——通过分散管理权和采用传递投票将控制权让渡给投资者，而无需内化相关的治理成本。

35387.title: GLP-1–Induced Weight Loss and the Female Obesity Penalty
35387.zh_title: GLP-1诱导的体重减轻与女性肥胖惩罚
35387.abstract: GLP-1 medications generate large weight loss and may also alter social and economic outcomes. Using the Understanding America Study, I compare women starting GLP-1s for weight loss with matched women who would like to start a GLP-1 but have not. Single women’s marriage/cohabitation rates rise by 29 percentage points and employment among baseline non-employed women rises 27 percentage points after six or more quarters. Existing partnerships do not dissolve, and already-employed women show no upward job mobility. The pattern suggests that part of the female obesity penalty operates at new-match formation rather than only through health or incumbent productivity.
35387.zh_abstract: GLP-1药物能产生显著的体重减轻效果，并可能改变社会和经济结果。利用《美国理解研究》数据，我将开始使用GLP-1减肥的女性与匹配的、希望开始使用但尚未使用的女性进行比较。单身女性的结婚/同居率上升了29个百分点，基线未就业女性的就业率在六个季度或更长时间后上升了27个百分点。现有伴侣关系并未解体，而已就业女性未表现出向上职业流动性。这一模式表明，女性肥胖惩罚的一部分作用于新匹配的形成，而非仅通过健康或现有生产力渠道。

35386.title: Openness, Integration, and the International Monetary Order
35386.zh_title: 开放、一体化与国际货币秩序
35386.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Thomas M. Mertens, Jingye Wang, Tony Zhang
35386.abstract: This paper develops a calibrated general-equilibrium model to study how different configurations of trade and financial policy reshape the hierarchy of global currencies—and the U.S. dollar's position at its anchor. Currency safety and anchor status arise endogenously from each economy's 'effective size'—the weight its domestic shocks carry in setting world prices. Tariffs reduce this effective size on the goods side; capital controls do the same on the financial side. A unifying result emerges: The economy that maintains the deepest integration with the global trading network retains the largest safety premium and gains anchor status. We use this framework to evaluate the effects of three policy levers for Europe that affect the effective size of the euro: internal harmonization and enlargement, trade openness, and capital-account openness. The stakes are large: In our model, shifts in currencies' safety can redirect global capital flows and alter sovereign borrowing costs by hundreds of billions of dollars annually.
35386.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个校准的一般均衡模型，研究贸易和金融政策的不同配置如何重塑全球货币的层级结构——以及美元在其锚定地位中的位置。货币安全性和锚定地位内生地源于每个经济体的“有效规模”——即其国内冲击在设定世界价格时的权重。关税在商品侧降低有效规模；资本管制在金融侧产生相同效果。一个统一的结果出现：与全球贸易网络保持最深度一体化的经济体保留最大的安全性溢价并获得锚定地位。我们利用这一框架评估欧洲影响欧元有效规模的三个政策杠杆的效果：内部协调与扩张、贸易开放度和资本账户开放度。其影响巨大：在我们的模型中，货币安全性的变化可以重新引导全球资本流动，并每年改变数千亿美元的主权借贷成本。
35386.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：F13, F31, F33, F36, F38, F41, G15

35385.title: The Fragility of Semi-Liquid Private Credit Funds
35385.zh_title: 半流动私募信贷基金的脆弱性
35385.authors: Chuck Fang, Itay Goldstein, Yao Zeng
35385.abstract: We study fragility in semi-liquid private credit funds, which have expanded rapidly and now manage over $\$300$ billion in assets. These funds perform liquidity transformation by holding far more illiquid loans than traditional loan mutual funds while allowing investors to redeem at NAV through quarterly repurchase offers, typically capped at 5% of shares outstanding. We show that cash buffers and contractual loan repayments are insufficient to fund repeated 5% quarterly redemptions; inflows decline precisely when outflows rise; and net outflows are met with sales of illiquid loans, external borrowing, and delayed payments through repurchases payable. As a result, strategic complementarity arises, because redemptions impose liquidation and leverage costs on the remaining investors. We show that loan liquidation, leverage increase, and NAV inflation play an important role in amplifying the current episodes of run-like redemptions. Overall, our evidence suggests that quarterly gates and redemption caps do not eliminate run-like fragility in semi-liquid private credit funds, raising cautions about expanding retail access to private credit markets.
35385.zh_abstract: 我们研究半流动私募信贷基金的脆弱性，这类基金迅速扩张，目前管理资产超过3000亿美元。这些基金通过持有比传统贷款共同基金多得多的非流动贷款来进行流动性转换，同时允许投资者通过季度回购要约（通常上限为流通股的5%）按资产净值赎回。我们表明，现金缓冲和合同贷款偿还不足以支持重复的5%季度赎回；资金流入恰在流出增加时下降；净流出通过出售非流动贷款、外部借款以及通过应付回购延迟支付来应对。因此，战略互补性出现，因为赎回对剩余投资者施加了清算和杠杆成本。我们表明，贷款清算、杠杆增加和资产净值膨胀在放大当前类似挤兑的赎回事件中发挥了重要作用。总体而言，我们的证据表明，季度门槛和赎回上限并未消除半流动私募信贷基金中类似挤兑的脆弱性，这引发了对扩大零售投资者进入私募信贷市场的谨慎态度。
35385.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G01, G11, G23, G32

35384.title: When Medicaid Pays the Bill: Routine Vision Benefits, Eye Care Use, and Eyeglasses Spending Among Dual-eligible Medicare Enrollees
35384.zh_title: 当医疗补助买单：双重资格医疗保险受益人的常规视力福利、眼科服务使用与眼镜支出
35384.authors: Michel H. Boudreaux, Brandy Lipton, Melissa McInerney
35384.abstract: Vision problems are prevalent among Medicare beneficiaries, with the majority having treatable conditions including uncorrected refractive error and cataracts. However, traditional Medicare does not cover routine eye exams or eyeglasses, and Medicare Advantage supplemental vision benefits often include low annual limits. We examine the effects of Medicaid routine vision benefits among adults dually eligible for Medicare and Medicaid, a population with high rates of vision impairment, morbidity, and disability. Using 2002-2019 Medicare Current Beneficiary Survey data and a difference-in-differences design, we estimate that Medicaid routine vision benefits increase past-year eye exams, eyeglasses purchases, and Medicaid spending on eyeglasses while reducing out-of-pocket spending. We also find suggestive evidence of spillovers to Medicare Advantage spending on eyeglasses, consistent with Medicaid routine vision coverage inducing additional eyeglasses purchases among Medicare Advantage enrollees with supplemental vision benefits, although estimates are modest.
35384.zh_abstract: 视力问题在医疗保险受益人中普遍存在，大多数人患有可治疗的疾病，包括未矫正的屈光不正和白内障。然而，传统医疗保险不覆盖常规眼科检查或眼镜，而医疗保险优势补充视力福利通常包含较低的年度限额。我们研究了医疗补助常规视力福利对同时符合医疗保险和医疗补助资格的成年人的影响，这一人群视力障碍、发病率和残疾率较高。利用2002-2019年医疗保险当前受益人调查数据和双重差分设计，我们估计医疗补助常规视力福利增加了过去一年的眼科检查、眼镜购买和医疗补助眼镜支出，同时减少了自付支出。我们还发现了向医疗保险优势眼镜支出溢出效应的提示性证据，这与医疗补助常规视力覆盖诱导医疗保险优势参保人额外购买眼镜（即使他们有补充视力福利）一致，尽管估计值较为温和。

35383.title: Unilateral-Veto Mechanisms
35383.authors: Quitzé Valenzuela-Stookey, E. Jason Baron, Richard Lombardo
35383.abstract: Unilateral vetoes, in which an agent takes an action that restricts the set of possible outcomes for themselves independent of what other agents do, are a frequently used tool in real-world approaches to multi-dimensional screening. We study how this tool works in a class of task-allocation problems. We characterize obvious strategy-proofness of unilateral-veto mechanisms, yielding structural insights into how veto rights shape incentives: obviously strategy-proof mechanisms consist of diverse menus of narrowly defined rights. We then examine the potential of this simple class of mechanisms as a practical market-design tool and provide empirical evidence of their efficacy in two applications.
35383.zh_abstract: 单边否决——即代理人采取一项行动，独立于其他代理人的行为，限制自身可能结果集——是现实世界中多维筛选问题的常用工具。我们研究该工具在一类任务分配问题中的运作方式。我们刻画了单边否决机制的明显策略防伪性，从而得出关于否决权如何塑造激励的结构性见解：明显策略防伪机制由多样化的狭义权利菜单组成。然后，我们考察了这类简单机制作为实用市场设计工具的潜力，并提供了其在两个应用中有效性的实证证据。
35383.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE；JEL：C78, D47, D61, D82, J45

35382.title: When GDP Misleads: Inferring Living Standards from the Value of a Statistical Life
35382.zh_title: 当GDP误导时：从统计生命价值推断生活水平
35382.abstract: Real GDP per person is a widely used proxy for living standards, but it can be a poor welfare measure when new goods or quality improvements matter, when nonmarket goods are significant, and when preferences are nonhomothetic --- all of which are true in practice. We propose an alternative that is robust to these concerns: under weak conditions, the growth rate of the value of a statistical life (VSL), together with standard Euler-equation objects, identifies the growth rate of lifetime utility. The intuition is that people routinely trade off consumption against mortality risk, and their willingness to pay for small risk reductions reveals the value of remaining lifetime utility. Implementing this approach for the United States suggests that lifetime utility may have risen by more than a factor of five since 1940, whereas conventional consumption-based calculations using a stable log/CRRA flow utility imply much smaller gains, on the order of a doubling. This calculation is sensitive to measures of the growth rate of the VSL, the rate of time preference, and the interest rate. For example, if the correct interest rate is 4 percentage points higher than the T-bill rate, then lifetime utility would be measured to have declined by more than half since 1940.
35382.zh_abstract: 人均实际GDP是广泛使用的生活水平代理指标，但当新产品或质量改进重要、非市场商品显著且偏好非位似时——这些在现实中均成立——它可能成为糟糕的福利度量。我们提出一种对这些担忧具有稳健性的替代方案：在弱条件下，统计生命价值（VSL）的增长率与标准欧拉方程对象共同识别终身效用的增长率。其直觉在于，人们通常用消费来权衡死亡风险，而他们为微小风险降低的支付意愿揭示了剩余终身效用的价值。在美国应用该方法表明，自1940年以来终身效用可能增长了五倍以上，而使用稳定对数/CRRA流动效用的传统消费计算则显示小得多的增长，大约翻倍。该计算对VSL增长率、时间偏好率和利率的度量敏感。例如，若正确利率比国库券利率高4个百分点，则自1940年以来终身效用将被测度为下降超过一半。

35381.title: Dynamic Individuals, Static Neighborhoods: Migration and Earnings Changes in Poor Neighborhoods
35381.zh_title: 动态个体、静态社区：贫困社区的迁移与收入变化
35381.authors: Andrew Garin, Ethan Jenkins, Evan E. Mast, Bryan A. Stuart
35381.abstract: This paper studies migration and earnings dynamics in poor neighborhoods using new administrative data linking residential location and earnings. Out-migration rates are higher in poor neighborhoods than elsewhere, and the majority of people who leave a poor neighborhood move to a richer one. Residents of poor neighborhoods also see significant earnings mobility, with average growth rates similar to richer areas. Estimates based on idiosyncratic, firm-specific pay changes show that increases in earnings are linked to migration to better neighborhoods. This results in the earnings of the cohort who lived in a poor neighborhood at baseline growing more than twice as fast as the earnings of these neighborhoods' contemporaneous residents. Overall, our results highlight an underappreciated reason why poor neighborhoods stay poor: initial residents whose earnings grow tend to move away.
35381.zh_abstract: 本文利用连接居住地与收入的新行政数据研究贫困社区的迁移与收入动态。贫困社区的迁出率高于其他地区，且离开贫困社区的大多数人迁往更富裕地区。贫困社区居民也经历显著的收入流动性，平均增长率与富裕地区相似。基于特质性、企业特定薪酬变化的估计显示，收入增长与向更好社区的迁移相关。这导致基线时居住在贫困社区的队列收入增长速度是这些社区同期居民收入增长速度的两倍以上。总体而言，我们的结果突出了一个未被充分认识的原因：初始居民收入增长者倾向于搬离，导致贫困社区持续贫困。

35380.title: Health Care Reform and Firm Dynamics: Evidence from Medicare Part D and the Retail Pharmacy Industry
35380.zh_title: 医疗改革与企业动态：来自Medicare D部分和零售药房行业的证据
35380.authors: Brandyn F. Churchill, Georgina Cisneros, Kelli R. Marquardt
35380.abstract: Health care reforms are often enacted before implementation, creating uncertainty that can shape firms’ decisions. We examine how Medicare Part D affected the retail pharmacy industry using 2000-2009 establishment-level data, leveraging the fact that Part D disproportionately affected counties with larger elderly populations. Consistent with predictions from a conceptual model in which pre-implementation uncertainty discourages entry and lower post-implementation margins prevent full recovery, we find that Part D was associated with a 5-percent reduction in pharmacies, driven by fewer openings rather than more closures. We also find suggestive evidence that reduced pharmacy access dampened Part D’s mortality benefits.
35380.zh_abstract: 医疗改革常在实施前颁布，由此产生的不确定性可能影响企业决策。我们利用2000-2009年机构层面数据，基于D部分对老年人口比例较大县的影响不成比例这一事实，考察Medicare D部分如何影响零售药房行业。与概念模型预测一致——实施前的不确定性抑制进入，实施后较低的利润率阻止完全恢复——我们发现D部分与药房数量减少5%相关，这由新开业减少而非关闭增加驱动。我们还发现暗示性证据表明，药房可及性降低削弱了D部分的死亡率收益。

35379.title: Leaning Against Inflation Experiences
35379.abstract: A large share of secular variation in real interest rates can be understood as the effect of monetary policy leaning against experience-based long-run inflation expectations. Survey microdata show that adaptive learning from experienced inflation generates highly persistent, slow-moving long-run inflation expectations. When expectations are shaped by experience, central banks cannot anchor them through communication. Instead, when expectations deviate from the inflation target, monetary policy must remain persistently hawkish or dovish to generate realized inflation outcomes that, through agents’ belief updating, gradually pull long-run expectations back toward the target. Consistent with this mechanism, I find a strong positive relationship between experience-based long-run inflation expectations and real interest rates in the U.S., Germany, the U.K., and Japan. Under their subjective expectations, private-sector agents do not anticipate future reversals in inflation and short-term real interest rates. As a result, long-term real interest rates move with experience-based long-run inflation expectations about as much as short-term real interest rates do, consistent with the data. Secular movements in real rates are also accompanied by persistent patterns in interest-rate forecast errors. Overall, the interaction of monetary policy and learning from experience generates a distinct source of secular real-rate variation, beyond movements in the natural rate of interest.
35379.zh_abstract: 实际利率的长期变动中很大一部分可理解为货币政策对抗基于经验的长期通胀预期的效果。调查微观数据显示，从经历通胀中适应性学习产生高度持久、缓慢变动的长期通胀预期。当预期由经历塑造时，央行无法通过沟通锚定预期。相反，当预期偏离通胀目标时，货币政策必须持续鹰派或鸽派，以产生实际通胀结果，通过代理人的信念更新逐步将长期预期拉回目标。与该机制一致，我发现美国、德国、英国和日本基于经验的长期通胀预期与实际利率之间存在强正相关关系。在其主观预期下，私人部门代理人并未预期未来通胀和短期实际利率的反转。因此，长期实际利率与基于经验的长期通胀预期的变动幅度与短期实际利率大致相同，与数据一致。实际利率的长期变动还伴随着利率预测误差的持续模式。总体而言，货币政策与从经历中学习的相互作用产生了实际利率变动的独特长期来源，超越了自然利率的变动。

35378.title: The Incredible Flexibility of Moment Matching
35378.abstract: We ask how far the choice of which moments to match can push estimates in misspecified structural models. The answer is: very far. Under regularity conditions, an adversarial researcher informed about the data distribution can choose moments that render any parameter value the unique solution to the population moment-matching problem. Moreover, in many cases they can do so with little increase in model-implied standard errors relative to maximum likelihood. We illustrate both results in a menu-cost model.
35378.zh_abstract: 我们探究在错误设定的结构模型中，选择匹配哪些矩能将估计结果推向多远。答案是：非常远。在正则条件下，了解数据分布的对立研究者可以选择矩，使得任何参数值成为总体矩匹配问题的唯一解。此外，在许多情况下，他们可以在模型隐含标准误相对于最大似然法几乎不增加的情况下做到这一点。我们在菜单成本模型中展示了这两个结果。

35377.title: Labor Market Responses to Tariffs: Frictions, Dynamics, and Policy Responses
35377.zh_title: 劳动力市场对关税的反应：摩擦、动态与政策应对
35377.abstract: This article introduces the evidence and associated modeling frameworks contemporary economists use to understand the effects of trade and trade policy on labor markets, with a particular emphasis on labor-market frictions and adjustment dynamics. The effects of trade shocks differ across industries, regions, and occupations, implying the presence of important adjustment frictions in labor markets, and these effects evolve slowly over time, implying the need for dynamic frameworks rationalizing slow transitions. After reviewing the key insights from this literature, we discuss policies aimed at mitigating costs to workers and ensuring that the gains from trade are shared more equitably.
35377.zh_abstract: 本文介绍当代经济学家用于理解贸易和贸易政策对劳动力市场影响的相关证据及建模框架，特别强调劳动力市场摩擦和调整动态。贸易冲击的影响因行业、地区和职业而异，意味着劳动力市场中存在重要的调整摩擦，且这些影响随时间缓慢演变，意味着需要能够合理解释缓慢转型的动态框架。在回顾该文献的关键见解后，我们讨论了旨在减轻工人成本并确保贸易收益更公平分享的政策。
35377.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F11, F14, F16, F62, F66

35376.title: Prices Versus Quantities Revisited: What Do Policymakers Need to Know to Set Pigouvian Taxes and Subsidies?
35376.zh_title: 价格与数量再审视：政策制定者设定庇古税与补贴需要了解什么？
35376.authors: Denise Dipasquale, Edward L. Glaeser, Adam M. Guren, Paul S. Willen
35376.abstract: What information do policymakers need to design Pigouvian taxes or subsidies? Standard logic suggests that it is sufficient to know the size of the externality and unnecessary to know about quantities. Yet this logic is incorrect if interventions have fixed costs, taxes create deadweight losses, or there are distributional concerns. We present a model in which these considerations can make it more valuable for policymakers to learn about equilibrium quantities. We apply the model to congestion pricing, which has high fixed costs, and to a proposed housing subsidy in Boston that features deadweight losses and distributional concerns.
35376.zh_abstract: 政策制定者设计庇古税或补贴需要哪些信息？标准逻辑认为，只需知道外部性的大小，无需了解数量。然而，如果干预措施存在固定成本、税收造成无谓损失或存在分配问题，这一逻辑便不成立。我们构建了一个模型，其中这些因素可能使政策制定者了解均衡数量变得更有价值。我们将该模型应用于具有高固定成本的拥堵定价，以及波士顿一项拟议的住房补贴（该补贴涉及无谓损失和分配问题）。

35375.title: Compensation vs. Reinforcement: Experimental Identification of Parental Aversion to Inequality in Offspring
35375.zh_title: 补偿与强化：父母对子女不平等厌恶的实验识别
35375.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Leonardo Bonilla-Mejía, Matias Busso, Sebastian Galiani, Hyunjae Kang, Juan S. Muñoz-Morales, Juan Pantano
35375.abstract: Parents may invest differently across children by compensating the disadvantaged child or by reinforcing the child with higher expected returns. We study this question using a conditional cash transfer experiment that uniquely randomized transfers at the student level, generating exogenous variation in transfer exposure across siblings within the same household. The transfers increased short-run attendance among treated students but generated negative spillovers on untreated siblings: untreated siblings of treated students were 3.7 percentage points less likely to graduate from college, a decline of about 30 percent relative to the control mean. We interpret these effects using a dynamic model of household schooling decisions that identifies parental aversion to inequality in children’s educational outcomes. The estimated model implies limited aversion to inequality in children’s educational outcomes and reproduces held-out treatment effects not used in estimation. A decomposition shows that the negative spillover is primarily driven by substitution in educational investments toward the treated child.
35375.zh_abstract: 父母可能通过补偿弱势子女或强化预期回报较高的子女来差异化投资。我们利用一项在学生层面随机分配转移支付的现金转移实验，在同一家庭内部兄弟姐妹间产生转移暴露的外生变异。转移支付提高了受助学生的短期出勤率，但对未受助兄弟姐妹产生了负面溢出效应：受助学生的未受助兄弟姐妹大学毕业概率降低3.7个百分点，较对照组均值下降约30%。我们通过一个家庭学校教育决策动态模型解释这些效应，该模型识别了父母对子女教育结果不平等的厌恶程度。估计模型表明，父母对子女教育结果不平等的厌恶有限，并复现了未用于估计的保留样本处理效应。分解分析显示，负面溢出效应主要由教育投资向受助子女的替代驱动。

35374.title: A Practitioner's Guide to Using Large Language Models and Generative AI in Economic History
35374.zh_title: 经济史研究中大语言模型与生成式AI的应用实践指南
35374.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are lowering the entry barriers to working with exciting data sources that used to require strong data science skills, such as handwritten ledgers, text, images, or sound recordings. This guide provides an introduction for researchers who are new to LLMs. It sets out a step-by-step workflow for turning a research idea into working code and data, and describes the four main ways of interacting with an LLM: the chat window, editor-integrated assistants, agentic coding tools, and the API. It then works through the decisions a practitioner meets in sequence, beginning with whether an LLM is the right tool and whether the data are allowed to be sent to one, then how to select models, write prompts, manage context limits, and control costs, and finally how to validate, reproduce, document, and correct LLM-generated measures in regression settings. A review of recent research shows how these tools already extract, link, harmonize, and classify historical data at scale. Four worked examples with replication files illustrate the use of LLMs. They classify emotions in paintings, link census records without names, measure newspaper salience and sentiment around the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act, and score the emotional delivery of Franklin D. Roosevelt's wartime speeches. The guide also condenses the workflow, the best-practice recommendations, and the preparation of replication packages into summary tables and checklists to aid applied economists.
35374.zh_abstract: 大语言模型（LLMs）正在降低使用以往需要强大数据科学技能（如手写账簿、文本、图像或录音）的激动人心数据源的准入门槛。本指南为LLMs新手研究者提供入门介绍。它阐述了将研究想法转化为可运行代码和数据的逐步工作流程，并描述了与LLM交互的四种主要方式：聊天窗口、编辑器集成助手、代理式编码工具和API。随后，指南按顺序探讨实践者面临的决策：从LLM是否为合适工具、数据是否允许发送至LLM，到如何选择模型、编写提示词、管理上下文限制和控制成本，最后在回归设定中验证、复现、记录和纠正LLM生成的度量指标。近期研究综述展示了这些工具如何大规模提取、链接、协调和分类历史数据。四个带复现文件的实例说明了LLM的使用：分类绘画中的情感、链接无姓名的人口普查记录、衡量1882年《排华法案》的报纸显著性和情感倾向，以及评分富兰克林·D·罗斯福战时演讲的情感表达。指南还将工作流程、最佳实践建议和复现包准备浓缩为汇总表格和清单，以辅助应用经济学家。

35373.title: How Do State “Auto-IRA” Policies Affect Household Balance Sheets?
35373.zh_title: 州级“自动IRA”政策如何影响家庭资产负债表？
35373.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Ngoc Dao, Kyung Min Lee, Sita Slavov
35373.abstract: We examine how state policies requiring firms to facilitate workplace retirement saving affect household balance sheets. Using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP), we compare private-sector workers likely exposed to Oregon’s Automatic-Enrollment Individual Retirement Account (Auto-IRA) policy with similar workers in not-yet-adopting states. We find that the Auto-IRA policy is associated with increases in IRA and employer-sponsored retirement plan ownership and assets. We also find increases in checking or savings account ownership and balances, as well as higher credit card debt. The results suggest that Auto-IRA policies spill over to household liquidity management and borrowing.
35373.zh_abstract: 我们研究了要求企业促进工作场所退休储蓄的州级政策如何影响家庭资产负债表。利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）数据，我们比较了可能受俄勒冈州自动注册个人退休账户（Auto-IRA）政策影响的私营部门工人与尚未采纳该政策的类似州工人。我们发现，Auto-IRA政策与IRA和雇主资助退休计划的拥有率及资产增加相关。我们还发现支票或储蓄账户拥有率及余额增加，以及信用卡债务上升。结果表明，Auto-IRA政策会溢出影响家庭流动性管理和借贷行为。
35373.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API

35399.title: Understanding Cross-State Variations in Medicaid Enrollment During and After the COVID-19 Pandemic
35399.zh_title: 理解新冠疫情期间及之后各州医疗补助注册的差异
35399.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Helena Detering, Anwita Mahajan
35399.abstract: The implementation and unwinding of the FFCRA's continuous coverage requirement generated historically large changes in Medicaid enrollment during the COVID-19 pandemic. Using a combination of descriptive and causal analyses, we examine the substantial cross-state differences in these changes, which remain little understood. We find that policies designed to ease unwinding frictions, as well as federal fiscal assistance to states, have little predictive power, suggesting limited roles for administrative design or liquidity constraints. Political preferences have modest predictive power during the unwinding period. Pandemic-era Medicaid expansions and more generous baseline eligibility thresholds are strongly associated with larger net enrollment gains.
35399.zh_abstract: 《家庭第一冠状病毒应对法案》持续覆盖要求的实施与退出，在新冠疫情期间导致了医疗补助注册人数的历史性大幅变化。通过结合描述性和因果分析，我们考察了这些变化中显著的跨州差异，这些差异至今仍鲜为人知。我们发现，旨在减少退出摩擦的政策以及联邦对各州的财政援助，几乎没有预测能力，这表明行政设计或流动性约束的作用有限。在退出期间，政治偏好具有适度的预测能力。疫情时期的医疗补助扩展和更慷慨的基线资格门槛，与更大的净注册增长密切相关。

35398.title: The Pass-through of Tariffs and Exchange Rates
35398.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
35398.abstract: This paper shows that the currency in which traded goods are invoiced has a first-order implication for the short-run impact of tariffs on the economy. If prices are set in terms of producer’s currency (PCP), a unilateral tariff is contractionary on impact, reducing GDP, and causing a deterioration in the trade balance. By contrast, with prices pre-set in buyers currency (LCP), the same tariff shock is expansionary, and improves the trade balance. The key difference between the two regimes lies in the differential exchange rate pass- through under PCP relative to LCP. In welfare terms however, the situation is reversed. A tariff under LCP leads to a fall in short-run welfare, as consumption and investment fall sharply, while the same tariff may be welfare enhancing under PCP. Under dollar currency pricing (DCP), we find results intermediate between the two invoicing regimes. With retaliation, the stark difference in pricing regimes is attenuated.
35398.zh_abstract: 本文表明，贸易商品计价货币的选择对关税在短期内的经济影响具有首要意义。如果价格以生产者货币（PCP）设定，单边关税在冲击发生时具有紧缩效应，会降低GDP并导致贸易平衡恶化。相反，如果价格预先以买方货币（LCP）设定，相同的关税冲击则具有扩张效应，并改善贸易平衡。两种机制之间的关键区别在于PCP相对于LCP下汇率传导的差异。然而，从福利角度看，情况则相反。在LCP下，关税导致短期福利下降，因为消费和投资急剧下降；而在PCP下，相同的关税可能提升福利。在美元计价（DCP）下，我们发现结果介于两种计价机制之间。在存在报复的情况下，定价机制之间的显著差异会被削弱。

35397.title: Let’s Chat: Leveraging Chatbot Outreach for Improved Course Performance
35397.zh_title: 我们来聊聊：利用聊天机器人外联提升课程表现
35397.authors: Katharine E. Meyer, Lindsay C. Page, Catherine Mata, Eric Smith, Brendan Tyler Walsh, Candice L. Fifield, Michelle Tyson, Amy E. Eremionkhale, Michael Evans, Shelby Frost, Eye Eoun Jung
35397.abstract: This study provides pre-registered, experimental evidence on the use of non-generative artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots to support students in large-enrollment undergraduate courses. We find the chatbot messaging increased students’ final grades and engagement with academic supports, such as tutoring. Treatment effects were generally consistent across student demographics, with the exception of treated women in a Microeconomics course, who earned final grades that were seven percentage points higher than women in the control group. This study provides evidence that integrating AI-enabled outreach and communication to students in their college courses can enhance student engagement, learning, and course performance.
35397.zh_abstract: 本研究提供了关于在大型本科课程中使用非生成式人工智能聊天机器人支持学生的预注册实验证据。我们发现，聊天机器人消息提高了学生的期末成绩以及对学术支持（如辅导）的参与度。处理效应在不同学生人口统计特征上总体一致，但微观经济学课程中接受处理的女性除外——其期末成绩比对照组女性高出七个百分点。本研究证明，在大学课程中整合人工智能驱动的外联与沟通能够增强学生的参与度、学习效果及课程表现。
35397.meta: 来源：NBER 官方网站 API

35396.title: New Evidence on the Health-Status Gradient from Imperial China
35396.zh_title: 来自中华帝国关于健康-地位梯度的新证据
35396.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Carol H. Shiue, Karen Eggleston
35396.abstract: We study the relationship between health and social status in China using genealogical data from the 14th to 19th centuries. The data covers broad segments of the population linking husbands, wives, and sons, allowing us to examine whether status was associated with survival not only for adult men but also across households and generations. In a sample centered on the early 1700s, the typical lifespan of married men is 52, but varies widely. High-status men have a 22 percent higher probability of living past 50 than low-status men, resulting in a lifespan advantage of seven years. High status is also associated with significant survival advantages for wives and children. The lifespan premium of the wife of a high-status man over the wife of a commoner exceeds 10 years, and the chance that the son of a high-status man dies before reaching 10 years is less than half that of a low-status man’s son. Up to the 17th century the lifespan advantage is largely confined to those with top status, while the health-status gradient across all status levels emerges during the 18th century. The findings provide new evidence on health-status inequality in a less-studied setting, and suggest that health-status inequality is usefully analyzed from a family and intergenerational perspective.
35396.zh_abstract: 我们利用14至19世纪的家谱数据研究中国健康与社会地位之间的关系。这些数据涵盖了广泛的人口群体，将丈夫、妻子和儿子联系起来，使我们能够考察地位是否不仅与成年男性的生存相关，而且跨家庭和代际也相关。在以18世纪初为中心的样本中，已婚男性的典型寿命为52岁，但差异很大。高地位男性活过50岁的概率比低地位男性高22%，导致寿命优势为7年。高地位还与妻子和子女的显著生存优势相关。高地位男性妻子的寿命比普通男性妻子长超过10年，高地位男性儿子在10岁前死亡的概率不到低地位男性儿子的一半。直到17世纪，寿命优势主要局限于最高地位者，而所有地位层级之间的健康-地位梯度则在18世纪出现。这些发现为在一个较少被研究的背景下提供了关于健康-地位不平等的新证据，并表明从家庭和代际视角分析健康-地位不平等是有益的。

35395.title: Seemingly Anchored Inflation Expectations
35395.abstract: Empirical evidence commonly cited as indicating that inflation expectations have become better anchored includes the declining sensitivity of expectations to inflation surprises over time, particularly around the adoption of inflation targeting. These patterns are typically attributed to the influence of explicit or implicit inflation targets on inflation expectations. We show that this evidence is consistent with a model of experience-based learning in which individuals learn solely from their life-time history of realized inflation, without anchoring their expectations to an announced inflation target. In this model, the prolonged experience of low short-run inflation persistence in the pre-COVID decades renders long-run expectations insensitive to inflation surprises, matching the patterns observed in empirical anchoring tests. A unique prediction of the experience-based learning model is also borne out in the data: the decline in surprise sensitivity since the 1980s is strongest among younger individuals. The memory of low inflation persistence experiences further explains why long-run inflation expectations remained stable in the face of the post-COVID inflation surge. At the same time, simulations indicate that the sensitivity of long-run expectations to inflation surprises would rise sharply if individuals were to experience another sustained episode of highly persistent inflation. Overall, long-run inflation expectations may be less firmly anchored than commonly believed.
35395.zh_abstract: 常被引用的实证证据表明通胀预期已更好锚定，包括预期对通胀意外敏感度随时间下降，尤其在通胀目标制采用前后。这些模式通常被归因于显性或隐性通胀目标对预期的影响。我们证明，该证据与基于经验的学习模型一致——在该模型中，个体仅从自身生命历程中的实际通胀历史学习，而不将预期锚定于公布的通胀目标。该模型下，新冠疫情前几十年低短期通胀持续性的长期经历，使长期预期对通胀意外不敏感，与实证锚定检验中观察到的模式吻合。基于经验的学习模型的一个独特预测也在数据中得到验证：自1980年代以来，意外敏感度的下降在年轻个体中最为显著。对低通胀持续性经历的记忆进一步解释了为何长期通胀预期在新冠疫情后通胀飙升中保持稳定。同时，模拟表明，若个体再次经历持续的高通胀时期，长期预期对通胀意外的敏感度将急剧上升。总体而言，长期通胀预期的锚定程度可能不如普遍认为的那么牢固。
